/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DEFENSE PC1538,5 MOTION/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY MOVE TO CONTINUE/ARG&SUB/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ON HOME DETENTION WITH CUTOUTS:/X:DEFENDANT TO COME TO COURT & SEEK EMPLOYMENT/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE 2 PRELIMINARY HEARINGS COMBINED ARE 3 HOURS/CONTD:TOSET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:I & A, PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-20-21 /987,2/NB/X:WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1,5 HOURS/DOP/
/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH2:CJ 25D/CTS:25/4019HALF/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA//CTORD:FINES AND FEES DEEMED PAID BASED ON EXCESS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED/CCU/REMA/
